#+title: ores.doc
#+description: The documentation technical space: org-mode doc scaffolds (facets, archetypes, agile artefacts) generated by doc_generate.
#+type: technical_space
#+level: cross
#+filetags: :codegen:physical-space:doc:
#+created: 2026-06-27
#+updated: 2026-07-16

This page is the node for the =ores.doc= technical space in the codegen
physical-space address graph. Its title is its MASD address; it gathers the
facets generated for this technical space. Each facet is its own document,
linked from the table below. Codegen traverses this graph (root → technical
space → facet → archetype) to resolve which archetypes an entity generates.

* Summary

Org-mode document scaffolds — the machinery behind =compass add=,
split across four facets by document family (agile, knowledge,
modeling, template). Unusually for this technical space the renderer
escapes nothing (=pystache.Renderer(escape=identity)=), and outputs
are org files whose own structure must round-trip the literate
escaping.

* Shared conventions

- Every scaffold opens with the =:PROPERTIES:/:ID:= drawer and the
  =#+title/#+description/#+type/#+level/#+filetags/#+created/#+updated=
  frontmatter contract.
- Stateful types render =#+todo:= vocabularies and a =* Status=
  table at the type's default state.
- Composition types receive =parent_id=/=parent_title= for the
  glossary-linked blurb.

* Facets

Facets in this technical space — each links to its own node doc. Generated;
do not edit by hand.

| Facet | Archetypes | Description |
|-------+------------+-------------|
| [[id:21169E9E-4948-4660-AB0E-61DB65C37B87][ores.doc.agile]] | 0* | Agile artefact scaffolds: task, story, sprint, version. |
| [[id:6D051AC6-0FB4-4188-99FE-846ACB19AB6D][ores.doc.knowledge]] | 0* | Prose doc scaffolds: knowledge, recipe, manual, skill, memory, capture, runbook. |
| [[id:3D46BA01-BAD7-44B2-BD70-FF30394698F0][ores.doc.modeling]] | 0* | Entity-modeling doc scaffolds: entity_org, field_group, table, junction, lookup_entity, service_registry, dataset_overview. |
| [[id:351F7645-3868-49C4-BFE5-2E1E76D47787][ores.doc.template]] | 4 | Codegen template scaffolds: facet, facet_group, technical_space, archetype docs. |

(* archetype docs for these facets have not yet been migrated onto the
physical-space graph; their templates still live as flat,
=#+type: knowledge=-tagged docs pending that follow-up.)

* See also
